message.content:
@startuml
!define CODESET "«Codeset»"
!define ATTRIBUTETYPE2CODE "AttributeType2Code"
!define EMAL "EMAL : EmailAddress"
!define CHLG "CHLG : ChallengePassword"

rectangle "Codeset" as codeset {
  circle "E" as e
  rectangle "AttributeType2Code" as attrtype2code
  rectangle "EMAL : EmailAddress" as emal
  rectangle "CHLG : ChallengePassword" as chlg

  e ..> attrtype2code
  attrtype2code ..> emal
  attrtype2code ..> chlg
}

@enduml
